name: Micro Tanks
short_description: Micro Tanks brings back classic artillery tank battles with big explosions. Play Classic Mode or Free For All, toggle wind, and land the perfect shot.
detailed_description:
THE CLASSIC ARTILLERY TANK GAME!

Line up the perfect shot in a retro-inspired tank duel packed with big explosions.

Time to get shell-shocked! Micro Tanks brings back the fan-favorite artillery tank gameplay you remember—simple controls, satisfying blasts, and that one perfect shot that flips the match. Battle an opponent in Classic Mode, or let chaos reign in Free For All as everyone fires at will. Toggle wind ON or OFF to change the challenge, then dial in your angle and power to make every shell count.

Features

  • Classic Mode tank battles

  • Free For All mode for anything-goes shootouts

  • Wind ON/OFF option for extra challenge

  • Retro visuals inspired by an old-school favorite

  • Pick-up-and-play artillery tank action

  • Big, satisfying explosions

  • Arcade-style quick matches

  • Gamepad support

Destroy your enemy before they destroy you!
